entries.note: V63-A reuses the shipped V60 continuation, shipped V61 communication, and shipped V62 sibling connector posture by default.
V63-A selects only the remote_operator principal and keeps external_assistant and human_via_connector deferred.
V63-A admits one read-mostly phone-safe remote view only.
V63-A keeps the bounded response set limited to acknowledge, approve, continue, pause, and escalate only.
V63-A responses consume shipped URM approval/session or shipped V60/V61 posture rather than inventing a new command ontology.
Structured answers, clarifications, inspect-rich controls, and the richer remote command bridge remain deferred to V63-B.
The selected remote surface remains path-level and non-generalizing by default.
